reasoning: The control AC-4(32) focuses on enforcing secure information flow, particularly through encryption and secure transport mechanisms. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that ingress traffic is secured with TLS, service mesh configurations enforce mTLS for secure service-to-service communication, network policies enforce secure transport, and API server communications are encrypted with TLS. These checks align with the requirement to enforce secure information transfer processes.
title: Information Flow Enforcement - Information flow enforcement | process requirements for information transfer whe
